query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat alert" OR "extreme weather warning" OR "climate information service" OR "weather advisory" OR "thermal comfort forecast" OR "heat index forecast" OR "cooling center" OR "cooling shelter" OR "cooling station" OR "heat shelter" OR "heat refuge" OR "air conditioning center" OR "community cooling" OR "public cooling facility" OR "emergency cooling") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "temperature-morbidity" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related illness" OR "temperature-related death" OR "excess mortality" OR "all-cause mortality" OR "cardiovascular mortality" OR "respiratory mortality" OR "heat wave" OR heatwave OR "extreme heat" OR "hot weather" OR "thermal extreme" OR "ambient temperature" OR "air temperature" OR "urban heat island" OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal exposure") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "instrumental variable" OR "propensity score" OR matching OR "randomized assignment" OR "random allocation" OR "experimental design" OR "causal inference" OR "causal identification" OR "treatment effect" OR "intervention study" OR "evaluation study" OR "impact evaluation" OR "program evaluation" OR "policy evaluation" OR "exogenous variation" OR "plausibly random" OR "identification strategy" OR counterfactual OR causality)
